unit.name: An authentication exception occurred.

segment.source: An authentication exception occurred.

unit.name: Authentication credentials could not be found.

segment.source: Authentication credentials could not be found.

unit.name: Authentication request could not be processed due to a system problem.

segment.source: Authentication request could not be processed due to a system problem.
segment.target: A hitelesítési kérést rendszerhiba miatt nem lehet feldolgozni.

unit.name: Invalid credentials.

segment.source: Invalid credentials.

unit.name: Cookie has already been used by someone else.

segment.source: Cookie has already been used by someone else.
segment.target: Ezt a sütit valaki más már felhasználta.

unit.name: Not privileged to request the resource.

segment.source: Not privileged to request the resource.
segment.target: Nem rendelkezik az erőforrás eléréséhez szükséges jogosultsággal.

unit.name: Invalid CSRF token.

segment.source: Invalid CSRF token.

unit.name: No authentication provider found to support the authentication token.

segment.source: No authentication provider found to support the authentication token.
segment.target: Nem található a hitelesítési tokent támogató hitelesítési szolgáltatás.

unit.name: No session available, it either timed out or cookies are not enabled.

segment.source: No session available, it either timed out or cookies are not enabled.
segment.target: Munkamenet nem áll rendelkezésre, túllépte az időkeretet vagy a sütik le vannak tiltva.

unit.name: No token could be found.

segment.source: No token could be found.

unit.name: Username could not be found.

segment.source: Username could not be found.

unit.name: Account has expired.

segment.source: Account has expired.

unit.name: Credentials have expired.

segment.source: Credentials have expired.

unit.name: Account is disabled.

segment.source: Account is disabled.

unit.name: Account is locked.

segment.source: Account is locked.

unit.name: User is disabled.

segment.source: User is disabled.

unit.name: You have to login in order to access this page.

segment.source: You have to login in order to access this page.
segment.target: Az oldal megtekintéséhez be kell jelentkeznie.

unit.name: Too many failed login attempts, please try again later.

segment.source: Too many failed login attempts, please try again later.
segment.target: Túl sok sikertelen bejelentkezési kísérlet, kérjük próbálja újra később.

unit.name: Too many failed login attempts, please try again in %minutes% minute.

segment.source: Too many failed login attempts, please try again in %minutes% minute.
segment.target: Túl sok sikertelen bejelentkezési kísérlet, kérjük próbálja újra %minutes% perc múlva.

unit.name: Too many failed login attempts, please try again in %minutes% minutes.

segment.source: Too many failed login attempts, please try again in %minutes% minutes.
segment.target: Túl sok sikertelen bejelentkezési kísérlet, kérjük, próbálja újra %minutes% perc múlva.
